name: Thuringia (Germany)

colors.symbolism: from the historic colours of Thuringia
from the historic colours of Thuringia

description: Two equal horizontal stripes of white over red.
history: Adopted on 30 October 1991 as the civil flag of the re-established Land of Thuringia following German reunification. The colours derive from the medieval Ludowingian striped lion, the historic emblem of the Landgraviate of Thuringia. The state flag adds the coat of arms with eight stars.

features.symbolism: The white-and-red of the Landgraviate of Thuringia, taken from the medieval Ludowingian lion (a red-and-silver striped lion on blue) that has been the heraldic symbol of the territory since the High Middle Ages.
